sections.sectionMetadataNote: SKIP - background is hero's own design (full-width image, edge-to-edge). No section padding visible.

sequences.description: Full-width banner with background image of family with car, heading 'The easy way to manage your auto loan', supporting text about setting up account, and 'Get started' CTA button
sequences.reason: Full-width banner with background image and text overlay requires Hero block structure (image row + content row). Reused existing hero-banner variant (70% similarity).

sequences.description: Centered heading 'Benefits of Wells Fargo auto financing'
sequences.reason: Just a heading - author types it. Centered alignment is CSS styling.

sequences.description: Grid of 3 items, each with a small circular icon, heading, and short description text (Nationwide network, Convenience, Peace of mind)
sequences.reason: Repeating structured pattern of 3 items each with icon/image + text content. Reused existing cards-icon variant (98% similarity).

sections.sectionMetadataNote: KEEP - solid teal/green background with visible section padding. Columns block inherits section styling.

sequences.description: Two-column layout: left side has phone mockup image; right side has heading 'Banking where and when you need it', description text, and Apple/Google app store download badges
sequences.reason: Side-by-side layout with image on left and text+download links on right. Created new columns-app-promo variant (best existing match only 20%).
